heading: Contracts for design and construction of facilities of Department of Defense
label: 2818 Contracts for design and construction of facilities of Department of Defense

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The head of an element of the Department of Defense (as defined in ) may award a contract to any other such element for the design and construction of facilities of the Department of Defense, including facility maintenance and repair projects and unspecified minor military construction projects under , on a reimbursable basis.section 111(b) of this titlesection 2805 of this title

children.heading: .—Consideration as an Obligation
children.label: b .—Consideration as an Obligation
children.text: A contract awarded under subsection (a) by such head shall be considered to be an obligation of such head in the same manner as a similar order or contract placed by such head with a private entity.

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: c .—Limitation
children.text: An awardee of a contract under subsection (a) may include an amount equal to not more than 10 percent of the proposed value of the contract for contingency expenses.
